prestazioni: Full bolt-on S55B30T0 (3.0L twin-turbo inline-6) Stage 2+ tune by MSS50 ECU reflash via Eurocharged's 'M4 F82 Competition Package', targeting 650whp on E85 with upgraded fuel system (10x Bosch Motorsport 0280158861 injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump + dual DW300C external pumps), and a custom-calibrated Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger setup with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates

Full drivetrain reinforcement with Wavetrac Torsen-style limited-slip differential (F8X-specific), MFactory 3.91:1 ring & pinion gear set, and South Bend Clutch Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch with organic/carbon hybrid friction material for 800+ lb-ft torque capacity

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (F82-specific valving), Vorshlag Motorsport spherical front control arms, and Hotchkis Sport Suspension 1.5° negative camber plates, paired with AP Racing CP9450 front 6-piston/CP9446 rear 4-piston calipers and Pagid RS29 brake pads on 20" Apex ARC-8 wheels (9.5" front, 11" rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 305/30/20 rear)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (F82-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and rear diffuser, finished in BMW Individual Frozen Brilliant White (354) with gloss black accents

Custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with quad 100mm outlets, integrated electronic bypass valves, and carbon fiber tips, paired with a CSF Race radiator and custom aluminum charge pipes (anodized gold) from FTP Motorsport

Interior rework featuring Recaro Pole Position CS-II seats (F82-specific mounting brackets), MCS Motorsport 6-point roll cage (half-cage, bolt-in), and a custom Alcantara-wrapped M Performance steering wheel with integrated AEM CD-7 dash display (replacing the stock cluster) and Motec PDM15 power distribution module
